name: @dotdotgod/cli
description: CLI for dotdotgod validation, project memory snapshots, and graph indexing.

scripts.verify: node --check bin/dotdotgod.mjs && node bin/dotdotgod.mjs validate ../.. --include-local-memory && node bin/dotdotgod.mjs index ../.. --json && node bin/dotdotgod.mjs status ../.. --json
